caption: A green-tinted night vision perspective shows a dual-rotor aircraft hovering low over a dark field, illuminated by bright landing lights on the ground. The aircraft remains steady in the center of the view, with a small blue pentagonal logo visible in the bottom right corner of the frame. As the sequence progresses, the view shifts from the night vision feed to a split-screen perspective. A woman wearing a camouflage military uniform is visible in a rectangular inset, smiling and looking toward the aircraft. She appears to be observing or controlling the operation. The scene transitions from a full-screen tactical view of the hovering aircraft to a composition that combines the green-hued aircraft footage with a live feed of the smiling service member.
